name: Strike
description: Step into range and put your weight behind the blow — deal damage to one adjacent enemy.

name: Heavy Strike
description: Wind up and swing with everything you have — hit one adjacent enemy for serious damage.

name: Quick Shot
description: Draw and loose before the moment passes — deal damage to one enemy within 3 tiles.

name: Disengage
description: Step back with practiced care — reposition 1 tile without triggering opportunity attacks.

name: Acid Splash
description: Hurl a flask of sizzling reagent — damages on contact and eats through the target's dexterity.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Shatter a smoke-filled vial — all units in the blast radius lose footing and dexterity.

name: Healing Draught
description: Uncork a bitter medicinal brew and down it — restore a measure of your own health.

name: Shield Bash
description: Lead with the rim of your shield — deal damage and disrupt the target's offensive strength.

name: Counter
description: Plant your feet and channel your resolve — temporarily sharpen your offensive strength.

name: Taunt
description: Bark choice insults at a nearby enemy — sap their resolve and force their attention onto you.

name: Inspire
description: Shout a rallying cry — bolster one ally's strength for the fight ahead.

name: Guard
description: Adopt a defensive stance — bolster your vitality to weather incoming blows.

name: Sweep
description: Drag your weapon in a wide arc — hits every enemy in a 3-wide arc directly in front of you.

name: Fireball
description: Hurl a sphere of roiling fire — scorches everything in the blast, allies included. Inner units shield those behind them.
notes: passthrough=false is explicit; inner units block those behind them

name: Heal Burst
description: Release a wave of restorative energy — heals all allies caught in the pulse.

name: Charge
description: Burst forward in a straight line — close the gap in one powerful rush.

name: Gust
description: Blast a target with a focused burst of wind — knock them 2 tiles directly away.

name: Yank
description: Grab and haul a target 2 tiles toward you — close range on a retreating foe.

name: Shove
description: Put your shoulder into it — slam an adjacent enemy back 2 tiles.

name: Windblast
description: Unleash a radial burst of force — blasts every enemy outward from the point of impact.

name: Fire Breath
description: Exhale a torrent of flame — scorches all enemies in an expanding triangle up to 3 tiles deep.

name: Piercing Shot
description: Draw and loose with full force — the bolt punches through every enemy in a straight line.

name: Focused Strike
description: A well-placed strike that hits cleanly — the hallmark of a Human's adaptable fighting style.

name: Savage Blow
description: An explosive burst of raw power — Half-Orc aggression poured into a single crushing hit.

name: Gadget Spark
description: A quick discharge from a pocket-sized device — Gnome ingenuity at its most immediate.
notes: kindred: Gnome natural attack; range 2 to reflect tinkerer distance

name: Stone Fist
description: Drive a compact powerful fist into the target — Dwarven stubbornness distilled into impact.

name: Steadfast
description: Plant your feet and draw on deep reserves — shore up your body against what's coming.

name: Battle Surge
description: Channel rising fury into pure offensive force — your next blow will hurt.

name: Warcry
description: Loose a guttural bellow — rattles every adjacent enemy and erodes their will to fight hard.

name: Tinker Boost
description: A quick recalibration of your gadgetry — your mind clicks a gear sharper.

name: Quick Wit
description: Read an opening in the target's reasoning and exploit it — leave them slower to react.

name: Stone Guard
description: Take a wide bracing stance and harden your defenses — born from stone-cutting discipline.

name: Tower Slam
description: Plant your feet and let all that weight become momentum — slam down hard enough to shunt the target backward.

name: Arcane Bolt
description: Compress raw arcane energy into a tight bolt and launch it — precise and painful at long range.

name: Slipshot
description: Fire off a quick shot then use the recoil to slide one tile — hit before they can read where you'll be.

name: Bless
description: Channel disciplined intent into a nearby ally — they feel the conviction enter their limbs.

name: Backstab
description: Close in with practiced silence and drive the blade home where it counts most.

name: Crippling Shot
description: Aim for a joint or limb — the hit does damage and leaves the target sluggish.

name: Vanishing Step
description: A practiced burst of speed — you're somewhere else before the eye can follow.

name: Lay on Hands
description: Press a hand to an ally's wound and pour disciplined focus into sealing it shut.

name: Divine Ward
description: Raise an unseen barrier of focused will — incoming blows lose some of their edge.

name: Rallying Shout
description: Bellow a surge of resolve to nearby allies — they feel it in their sword arms.

name: Bone Strike
description: Drive a knuckle of exposed bone into the target — the impact is harder than it looks.

name: Grim Endurance
description: The undead do not tire easily — shore up what little remains.

name: Death Rattle
description: Loose a sound no living throat could make — it unsettles even the bravest soul.

name: Gnaw
description: Sink needle-sharp teeth into the target — quick and relentless.

name: Scatter
description: Bolt in any direction — rats always find the gap.
notes: kindred ancestry; Giant Rat pool; cost 1 — intentionally cheapest move in the game

name: Pack Instinct
description: A chittered signal rallies whoever is close — strength in numbers.

name: Venom Bite
description: Pierce with hollow fangs and inject venom — the damage compounds.

name: Web Shot
description: Fire a sticky strand — the target is suddenly very slow.
notes: kindred ancestry; Spider pool; -2 dex intentionally potent

name: Skitter
description: Eight legs and no hesitation — blink across the ground.

name: Claw Swipe
description: Rake massive claws in a wide arc — whatever is adjacent regrets it.
notes: kindred: Dragon natural attack; arc target at natural-attack cost

name: Draconic Breath
description: Exhale a gout of elemental force — the cone widens with every tile.
notes: kindred ancestry; Dragon pool; cheaper cone than fire_breath

name: Scales Up
description: Flex ancient scales into a tighter formation — harder to pierce.
